tax: Placed at genus rank, Sparkmote is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a clinging static-mote body. A new species belongs here only if it shows a clinging surface-static body.
ap: The grouping is recognised by a faint glowing static mote. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — a fizzing residue and scorch-spots — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Sparkmote occupies dry charged galleries. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where air-pressure animates surface static and recur with the gallery re-charges, sustaining themselves on surface static charge.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: crawls onto gear and shocks contact. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: clinging mote and charge-sense. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each species and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: contact-shock and conductor-crawl. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Sparkmote matters because shocks the hand via the rope. It lets survey reports sort clinging-mote forms from striking-cloud ones without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Sparkmote is the genus-rank grouping of clinging-static mote elementals within the True Elementals. Its members share a clinging static body that crawls and shocks on contact, and divide below into species groups by charge build and mote size. A crawling spark that rides your gear.
